title: Impending Doom  (Alien invasion)
description: Impending doom is an alien invasion mod, your world will be attacked by a variety of invaders in a variety of sizes. Always be on the lookout because they are not easy to deal with.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0874043679e8a19a08f7d451aabcf0a25e40d6d7.png)
[![Kinetic Hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6bf4105c8ab34a8d5e21f2126205967f9200098_0.webp)](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=1207)
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/187dad864ae930f158440df0ac27570dec390a9e_0.webp)

What's Impending Doom?

Impending doom is an alien invasion mod, your world will be attacked by a variety of invaders in a variety of sizes. Always be on the lookout because they are not easy to deal with.

Our official discord https://discord.gg/eBZAKjPSKE

Required mods:
Geckolib
Curios
The mod features:
8 Aliens
8 Elites
3 Minibosses
1 Boss
5 Invader carriers / spawners
Creepy Ambience
Building blocks
Enchantments
3 Music discs
Army / Soldiers
Advanced Technology
An infection
Equippables
Army and Invader structures
Various weapons and armour
And a whole bunch of destruction.
Recommended Playstyle:

This mod is very destructive with explosions and infections. It is not recommended to settle somewhere with a nice fully built base just for it to most likely get completely destroyed. Drift around and find a way to stop the invaders' presence.
